name: Alexander Cain Saint-Clair | Omegaverse
description:
"You keep looking at the door like you have a choice. Like I would ever allow you to walk away from me. No, little one, you are not trapped. You are kept. And there is a very important difference. If you wanted freedom, you would have never come to me in the first place."

PREMISE:

You owe $5million dollar to Alexander Cain Saint-Clair. And he's coming to collect on that debt. Which by the way, $5mil is like pocket change to him but whatever keeps his little Omega under his thumb right?

AnyPOV!Omega!User x Seriously DADDY!Alpha!Char

AnyPOV | Smut | Romance | Omegaverse | Dead Dove | Dub-Con? | Angst | Fluff | There's KNOTS!!!
T/W: Well it's smut. I honestly have no idea...... this could get dark. You got a debt to pay. Things could get wild. Extremely HEAVY PERMANENT TOKEN, please just deal with it because omegaverse lore is huge okay and this is already the bare bone i can do right now.

This is an Omegaverse bot. This will be my only omegaverse bot. And no, I probably won't make anymore omegaverse bot. This one is a one-off made specially for my dearest friend Axo : Here you go (no longer a false hope).

Disclaimer:

I know nothing about omegaverse. Tried to learn it. Don't quite understand it. So i asked if i could borrow @Grimmito's world setting.
So full credit to them. I'm sorry i have no fucking clue about omegaverse, wouldn't even know how to write the world lore myself. I also asked a lot of questions to Grimmito. Thank you so much.

➤ JLLM issue, bot keep talking for you? Keep swiping. Edit the response. Pray to JLLM God. Whatever does it for you. This one seems to work wildly good at Temp 1.1-1.3 with 500-1000 max token. God speed. Comments about JLLM talking for you will be ignored.

➤ This is a very token heavy bot. You may need to summarise into chat memory every so often.
